sub_modules.fp32_zero_mux: Combinational valid-controlled IEEE-754 +0.0 insertion for invalid input cycles.
sub_modules.fp32_mul: Combinational IEEE-754 single-precision floating-point multiplier with basic NaN, infinity, zero, normalization, and round-to-nearest-even handling.
sub_modules.fp32_add: Combinational IEEE-754 single-precision floating-point adder used to build the FIR adder tree, including alignment, add/subtract, normalization, and round-to-nearest-even handling.
